evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: scalable, reliable, and high-quality data solutions
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour because the primary framing for all deliverables is 'scalable, reliable, and high-quality' with no velocity or speed-to-ship signals present.
evidence.domain_risk: consultancy serving Finance, Sales, HR, and Project Management teams; no regulated sector named
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as moderate because Retail Consult is a consultancy without named regulated industry exposure, where errors affect business decisions without direct regulatory or financial reporting consequence.
evidence.data_team_maturity: Training and Mentoring/Talent Development programs; data lake and data warehouse experience required
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mid because the firm has structured talent development programs and requires data lake/warehouse experience, implying existing data infrastructure in a growing consultancy.
evidence.jd_authorship: designing data architectures, optimising PostgreSQL databases, developing Power BI dashboards, and managing ETL/ELT pipelines
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as recruiter because responsibilities are generic task descriptions without specific context, scale, or methodology — they could describe any data engineering/BI role at any consultancy.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: collaborating with Finance, Sales, HR, and Project Management teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as mixed because Finance, Sales, HR, and Project Management are all named as primary collaboration targets with equal weight across responsibilities.
evidence.autonomy_level: designing data architectures; transform business needs into scalable data solutions
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as mixed because 'designing data architectures' signals strategic technical input while 'transforming business needs' signals execution in service of named business functions.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool usage or AI infrastructure enablement is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: No testing or data quality signal anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Classified as absent because no testing tools, data contracts, observability, or data quality validation practices are mentioned anywhere in the posting.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Classified as none because 'scalable, reliable, and high-quality' is standard delivery framing with no risk, compliance, or stakeholder-trust language present.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: designing data architectures; managing ETL/ELT pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as mixed because the role spans designing new architectures (greenfield) and managing/optimising existing pipelines and databases (fix_scale) in a consultancy context.
